design_patterns.spacing: Generous. Use p-6, p-8 for cards. Gap-6 or gap-8 for grids.
design_patterns.borders: Subtle 1px borders (border-white/5) to separate dark elements without relying solely on shadows.
design_patterns.radius: rounded-2xl for main cards, rounded-full for buttons and avatars
design_patterns.shadows: Ambient glows instead of drop shadows. shadow-[0_0_40px_-10px_rgba(196,181,253,0.15)] for active/playing elements.

components.audio_player: Persistent bottom bar, Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#0A0A0E]/80 border-t border-white/5). Include track info, play controls, volume, queue button, and 'Start Party' icon.
components.party_room: Immersive layout. Hero area shows synced rotating album art. Right sidebar or floating panel for live chat and shared queue. Accent glows pulse with music.
components.cards: Music albums and playlists use Cardless approach or extremely subtle Glass panels with hover uplift (-translate-y-1) and image zoom.
components.buttons: Primary buttons: bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 text-white backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10. Avoid flat solid bright colors to keep it calm and premium.

album_covers.description: Vivid red and blue swirls, modern abstract art
Blue and purple computer generated flower

instructions_to_main_agent: Install framer-motion for smooth transitions and the player seek bar.
Implement the 'Party Room' as a distinct view with a large central album cover, synced progress bar, and a sidebar for the chat & member list.
Ensure the persistent audio player stays fixed at the bottom across all views (Home, Profile, Library) except maybe Auth.
For the UI, avoid standard shadcn Cards; use div containers with `rounded-2xl bg-white/5 border border-white/5 backdrop-blur-lg` to create the 'glass' luxury feel.
Add 'data-testid' to ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, player controls).
Use deep void dark background (#0A0A0E) with very desaturated pastel accent colors (#C4B5FD) to ensure the 'premium, calm' theme user requested.
